messages.content:
中译英：   学习能力较强，对景观设计有自己的认知，能够注重设计的实际落地性，关注设计原场地的问题，能够从解决问题的角度思考问题。


从园林植物配置作业中看出，已具备园林设计的基本能力，能突出表现对园林设计的思考能力。在其他课程的学习中也能展现较好的汇报、探索、创新能力。

Strong learning ability, independent understanding of landscape design, able to focus on the practical implementation of design, pay attention to the issues of the original site, and able to think from the perspective of problem-solving.

From the assignment on landscaping plant configuration, it can be seen that there is already a basic ability in landscape design, and the thinking ability in landscape design can be highlighted. Good reporting, exploration, and innovation abilities can also be demonstrated in other courses.

润色如下内容：Strong learning ability, independent understanding of landscape design, able to focus on the practical implementation of design, pay attention to the issues of the original site, and able to think from the perspective of problem-solving.

From the assignment on landscaping plant configuration, it can be seen that there is already a basic ability in landscape design, and the thinking ability in landscape design can be highlighted. Good reporting, exploration, and innovation abilities can also be demonstrated in other courses.

The individual demonstrates a strong aptitude for learning and possesses a keen understanding of landscape design. They show a particular ability to prioritize the practical implementation of designs and exhibit awareness of the site-specific considerations. Moreover, their problem-solving approach appears to be solution-oriented. 

In the case of the landscaping plant configuration assignment, it is evident that the individual possesses a solid foundation in landscape design and exhibits remarkable thinking capabilities within this field. Additionally, they demonstrate commendable skills in reporting, exploring new ideas, and showcasing their innovative thinking across various courses.
中译英：我是她大三课程《建筑工程施工材料》和《生态景观规划（GIS）》课程授课老师。
I am her professor for the third-year courses "Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering" and "Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)".
润色如下内容：I am her professor for the third-year courses “Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering” and “Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)”.
I am her professor for the courses "Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering" and "Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)" in her third year.

中译英：在我教授的两个课程中，她都积极参与课堂汇报，作为小组代表向我展现小组作业成果，并与我积极交流。
在建筑工程施工材料课程中积极学习材料方面的知识，课堂上与我积极互动，在小组设计作业中也表现出色，与小组成员合作顺利。
在生态景观规划的课程学习中，充分体现了她个人的学习能力，在学习GIS软件过程中她可以很快掌握，并积极帮助其他同学，和同学们探讨软件使用的技巧。对于景观生态学理论知识掌握较好。在小组作业汇报中她多次担当汇报人，对景观生态学在实际中的运用有较为深刻的认知，能够熟练运用GIS软件进行分析，同时在实际调研中也十分认真，积极收集实地数据和资料。最后，小组作业的完成度较高。
在两门课程中，她都取得了不错的成绩，生态景观规划92，生态景观规划课程实习95，建筑工程施工材料95。

In both of the courses I taught, she actively participated in classroom presentations, representing her group to showcase their project outcomes and engaging in active communication with me. 

In the course "Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering," she demonstrated a strong enthusiasm for learning about materials. She actively interacted with me during class and performed exceptionally well in group design assignments, collaborating smoothly with her group members.

In the "Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)" course, she showcased her exceptional learning abilities. She quickly grasped the concepts of GIS software and actively assisted other classmates, engaging in discussions on software techniques. She displayed a good understanding of theoretical knowledge in landscape ecology. During group project presentations, she frequently took on the role of presenter, demonstrating a profound understanding of the practical application of landscape ecology. She was able to proficiently use GIS software for analysis and conducted thorough field research, collecting real-time data and information diligently. Overall, the group project completion rate was high.

In both courses, she achieved impressive grades: 92 in Ecological Landscape Planning and 95 in the internship section of the same course, as well as 95 in Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering.

润色如下内容：In both of the courses I taught, she actively participated in classroom presentations, representing her group to showcase their project outcomes and engaging in active communication with me.

In the course “Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering,” she demonstrated a strong enthusiasm for learning about materials. She actively interacted with me during class and performed exceptionally well in group design assignments, collaborating smoothly with her group members.

In the “Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)” course, she showcased her exceptional learning abilities. She quickly grasped the concepts of GIS software and actively assisted other classmates, engaging in discussions on software techniques. She displayed a good understanding of theoretical knowledge in landscape ecology. During group project presentations, she frequently took on the role of presenter, demonstrating a profound understanding of the practical application of landscape ecology. She was able to proficiently use GIS software for analysis and conducted thorough field research, collecting real-time data and information diligently. Overall, the group project completion rate was high.

In both courses, she achieved impressive grades: 92 in Ecological Landscape Planning and 95 in the internship section of the same course, as well as 95 in Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering.

In both of the courses I taught, she actively participated in classroom presentations, effectively representing her group to showcase their project outcomes and engaging in active communication with me.

In the "Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering" course, she exhibited a strong passion for learning about materials. She actively interacted with me during class and excelled in group design assignments, demonstrating excellent collaboration skills with her team members.

In the "Ecological Landscape Planning (GIS)" course, she demonstrated exceptional learning abilities. She quickly grasped the concepts of GIS software and actively assisted her classmates, actively engaging in discussions on software techniques. She displayed a solid understanding of theoretical knowledge in landscape ecology. During group project presentations, she frequently took on the role of presenter, showcasing a profound understanding of the practical application of landscape ecology. She skillfully utilized GIS software for analysis and conducted comprehensive field research, diligently collecting real-time data and information. The group achieved a high completion rate for their project.

Overall, she achieved impressive grades in both courses: 92 in Ecological Landscape Planning and 95 in the internship section of the same course, as well as 95 in Construction Materials in Architectural Engineering.
中译英：她具备良好的设计能力，对制图软件的掌握能力较强，自主学习能力较好，能够将理论知识联系实际，运用到实际案例中，对景观设计有一定的热爱。她能够熟练掌握景观设计过程中需要的软件，例如GIS、Sketch Up、PS等等，在课程作业中有所展现。在小组作业的设计过程中，展现出了较为出色的设计能力和沟通能力。

She possesses excellent design skills and demonstrates a strong command of graphic design software. She has a strong ability for self-directed learning and can effectively apply theoretical knowledge to practical cases, showcasing a certain passion for landscape design. She is proficient in using software required for landscape design processes, such as GIS, Sketch Up, and Photoshop, as demonstrated in course assignments. During group design projects, she exhibits remarkable design and communication abilities.

润色如下内容：She possesses excellent design skills and demonstrates a strong command of graphic design software. She has a strong ability for self-directed learning and can effectively apply theoretical knowledge to practical cases, showcasing a certain passion for landscape design. She is proficient in using software required for landscape design processes, such as GIS, Sketch Up, and Photoshop, as demonstrated in course assignments. During group design projects, she exhibits remarkable design and communication abilities.

She possesses outstanding design skills and demonstrates a high level of proficiency in graphic design software. Her ability for self-directed learning is commendable, and she effectively applies theoretical knowledge to practical cases, reflecting her passion for landscape design. She exhibits proficiency in using essential software for landscape design processes, such as GIS, SketchUp, and Photoshop, as evidenced by her performance in course assignments. Notably, she showcases remarkable design and communication abilities during group design projects.

润色如下内容：Therefore, I am sure that Miss Yunying LI, with her academic passion and rigor, as well as the strong ability to apply knowledge to practice, will harvest greater success in her future study and research at your prestigious university. Therefore, I recommend her to your university with absolute confidence.

Therefore, I am confident that Miss Yunying Li, with her academic passion and rigor, as well as her strong ability to apply knowledge to practice, will achieve even greater success in her future studies and research at your esteemed university. With absolute confidence, I highly recommend her for admission to your university.
